name: codex-remote-ios
description: Remote iOS control surface for local Codex on macOS

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/protocol && npm run build -w apps/mac-companion
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/protocol && npm run clean -w apps/mac-companion
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/protocol && npm run lint -w apps/mac-companion
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/protocol && npm run test -w apps/mac-companion
